perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Three young women in swimsuits stand in an indoor locker room or lobby area, talking excitedly to a camera held at a high angle. The woman in the center wears a pink bikini with long braids. (2) They count down and run through a doorway into a cold outdoor corridor, shivering and laughing. (3) They enter a large natural outdoor hot spring surrounded by heavy snow and icy rocks. Mist and steam rise from the water. (4) Each woman takes turns climbing onto a large, snow-covered rock in the middle of the spring to pose for photos, showing various swimsuit styles (black mesh, sparkly silver, and pink). (5) They submerge themselves in the water, showing ice crystals forming on their hair while talking about the temperature. (6) The scene shifts back indoors where the main character in the pink bikini is now wearing a white fuzzy coat and brown earmuffs, giving a thumbs up. (7) A slideshow of high-quality edited photos from the shoot plays at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy upbeat J-pop style music with female vocals starts immediately. Three female voices talk simultaneously in an excited, high-pitched tone indoors. (2) Loud shouting, screaming, and laughter as they exit the building into the cold; ambient sounds of running footsteps and door slamming. (3) Continuous upbeat music with a steady drum beat (approx 130 BPM). The main speakers' voices remain clear despite the outdoor ambient noise of water splashing and background chatter. (4) Splashing sounds and playful banter as they coordinate photo poses. (5) Sound of water flowing and the girls commenting on the 'heavenly' feeling of the hot water. (6) Music volume remains consistent through the indoor wrap-up and the final photo reel.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '當你在零下20度泡溫泉' (When you soak in a hot spring at -20 degrees). (2) Functional Text: '我們現在在阿拉斯加' (We are now in Alaska). (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '人生第一次在雪中泡湯' (First time in life soaking in snow) with heart-eyes emoji. (4) Label: '一號選手小愛' (Contestant No. 1 Xiao Ai), '二號選手林莎' (Contestant No. 2 Lin Sha), '三號選手元元' (Contestant No. 3 Yuan Yuan). (5) Functional Text: '在雪地泡溫泉要多少錢？' (How much does it cost to soak in a snow hot spring?). (6) Functional Text: '值得嗎？我覺得超值得！！！' (Is it worth it? I think it's super worth it!!!).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro indoors -> Transition to outdoor cold -> Soaking/Posing in hot spring -> Indoor conclusion -> Photo slideshow

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 main female creators, several male and female tourists in the background of the hot spring.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Main character (Yuan Yuan) in a pink bikini with double braids; Lin Sha in a black mesh long-sleeve swimsuit; Xiao Ai in a silver sparkly one-shoulder swimsuit.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The outdoor scene features a large geothermal pool with steam rising, surrounded by jagged rocks covered in thick white snow and frost-covered evergreen trees under a twilight blue sky.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Bright indoor fluorescent and dim outdoor natural twilight with some colorful ambient floodlights.
visual_scene_and_style.colorTone: Cinematic/Cool (blues and whites outdoors, warm indoors)

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Transition -> Demonstration -> Recap -> Portfolio
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and promote a travel experience in Alaska, specifically the unique contrast of bathing in extreme sub-zero temperatures at the Chena Hot Springs, while showcasing the personalities and fashion of the three female creators.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed mention of location, showing signage, and discussing pricing and 'worth' of the experience.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-angle 'selfie-stick' vlog perspective with high-density variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets a youthful demographic interested in travel, photography, and influencer lifestyles, using high-contrast visual elements (bikinis vs. snow) to maximize viewer retention.
